name: Sicilian Defense Morphy Variation
description: A common Sicilian setup with ...Nc6, leading into many important branches.

description: A sharp Sicilian system where White develops with Bg5 and attacks Black's kingside structure.

name: Sicilian Defense Kalashnikov Variation
description: A close relative of the Sveshnikov where Black gains space with ...e5 and active piece play.
movesPreview: 1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 e5

name: Slav Defense Exchange Variation
description: A straightforward Slav line where White exchanges early and plays a simple structure.

description: A flexible Slav system where Black plays ...a6 early to prepare queenside development.

description: One of the sharpest Semi-Slav lines, full of deep theory and tactical complications.

name: Grunfeld Defense Fianchetto Variation
description: A controlled anti-Grunfeld system where White fianchettos and aims for stability and central pressure.

description: A solid English structure with both sides developing naturally and keeping many transpositional options.

name: English Opening Reversed Sicilian
description: An English structure with Sicilian-like ideas but with White having the extra tempo.

description: A Réti setup where White uses kingside fianchetto and central pressure in reversed Grünfeld-like structures.

name: Polish Opening Orangutan Variation
description: A flank opening starting with b4, aiming for asymmetrical play and unusual queenside pressure.
